angles.argument: cancer rates rose sharply in country X right after 5G rollout began there
search_queries: cancer rates increase country X recent years

angles.argument: this one person I know developed cancer soon after 5G tower installed nearby
5G uses higher frequencies than 4G, and higher frequencies mean more energy that can damage cells like radiation
imagine if 5G keeps expanding, soon we'll have towers everywhere zapping us with constant radiation leading to cancer epidemics
while studying cell phones, they found RF radiation is possibly carcinogenic, and 5G is just more powerful cell tech
what about all the bees dying off in areas with new 5G, and bees get cancer-like diseases from radiation too?
in this city with early 5G, brain cancer cases spiked compared to national average
5G will overload us with signals, causing constant low-level radiation exposure that builds up to cancer over time
